coachingPoints: Reps > lectures. Talk 15 sec, demo 15 sec, move.
4 stations, rotate every 10 min on whistle. Coaches stay, kids move.
Station 1 has 4 kids (2 hit, 1 pitch, 1 shag/catch). Others = 3 kids each.
Pitch station: STOP if arm drops sidearm or kid fatigued — protect arms.
Scrimmage 6v7: 13 kids split 6 bat / 7 field, swap halfway. Coach pitch. 5-run cap per inning.
Praise effort and mechanics, not outcomes.

blocks.title: Warm up
drills: Dynamic warm up + light running. Coach's call.
blocks.notes: 10 min. Get loose, raise heart rate, arm circles before throwing.

blocks.title: 4-station rotation — 10 min each

stations.name: Station 1 — Hitting + Pitching
drills: Hit side (L-screen or net): soft toss — mid/in/out, 10 swings. Then front toss, 5 swings.
Pitch side (bullpen net or catcher): 10 flat warmup throws, then 15–20 pitches from stretch.
Shag kid flips balls + resets net. Swap shag ↔ hitter at 5 min.
Pitcher swap at 5 min — second kid takes mound.
Cues: 'knob to ball, barrel through zone' (hit) / 'balance, stride closed, follow through' (pitch)
STOP pitcher if arm drops sidearm or kid fatigued.

stations.name: Station 2 — Outfield
drills: Round 1: drop-step reads — first step back, no drift forward
Round 2: catch over throwing shoulder, two hands
Round 3: catch → crow-hop → throw to cutoff (partner or cone at 40 ft)
Mix in line drives + over-the-head balls
Call it loud: 'BALL! BALL! BALL!'

stations.name: Station 3 — Left-side infield (3B / SS)
drills: 1 kid at 3B, 1 at SS, 1 at 1B target
Round 1: routine grounders — wide base, funnel to belly button, throw to 1B
Round 2: backhand — step with right foot (RHT), glove thumb down
Round 3: slow roller charge play — two hands, throw on run
SS feed for force at 2B (3B simulates runner) — quick transfer
Rotate 3B ↔ SS ↔ 1B every 4 reps

stations.name: Station 4 — Right-side infield (1B / 2B)
drills: 1 kid at 1B, 1 at 2B, 1 backup/target
Round 1: routine grounders to 2B — throw to 1B, stretch and catch
Round 2: 1B fielding — scoop short-hop, flip to pitcher covering (cone)
Round 3: 2B turning double play — underhand toss to SS bag (cone), force footwork
1B focus: stretch only when ball released, foot on inside corner
Rotate 1B ↔ 2B ↔ backup every 4 reps

blocks.notes: Whistle to rotate at 10 min. Coaches stay, kids move. Group assignment: 4 → S1 (hitting/pitching needs extra), 3 each to S2/S3/S4.

blocks.title: 6v7 scrimmage — coach pitch
drills: Split 13 kids: Team A (6) and Team B (7). Swap bat/field halfway (~12 min).
Fielding 7: P (coach pitches), 1B, 2B, SS, 3B, LF, CF, RF — drop one OF if only 7 kids fielding (use 6 field + coach helper)
Coach pitches both sides. 5-run cap per half-inning.
Batters: 5 pitches max or hit it. Run live.
Outs count. Real throws. Call plays loud.
Swap sides at 12 min or after 3 outs per side — whichever first.
Last 1 min: quick team talk — one thing each kid did well.
blocks.notes: Keep it moving. No long huddles. Coaches narrate reads: 'ball in dirt — go!' / 'freeze, ball in.'

coachingPoints: Reps > lectures. Talk 15 sec, demo 15 sec, move.
4 stations, 3 players each, rotate every 12 min on coach whistle.
At Atom: praise effort and mechanics, not outcomes.
Pitching station: stop immediately if arm drops sidearm or kid looks fatigued — protect arms.
Simulated game: every kid hits once. Run off 10th pitch regardless of contact — keeps pace.

blocks.title: Running warm-up (4 lines)
drills: Setup: 4 lines at starting cone, cones ~100 ft apart, down-and-back rotations
1. Light jog
2. Light jog (faster)
3. High knees
4. Butt kicks
5. Side shuffle (right)
6. Side shuffle (left)
7. Karaoke
8. Sprint down / jog back
9. Sprint down / backpedal back
10. Full sprint
blocks.notes: 10 total reps, down-and-back. Keep lines tight — next kid goes when prior finishes cone.

blocks.title: 4-station rotation — 12 min each

stations.name: Station 1 — Fielding
drills: Round 1 (4 min): routine grounders from 25 ft — 'wide base, funnel to belly button'
Round 2 (4 min): backhand — step with right foot (RHT), glove thumb down
Round 3 (4 min): charge play — short-hop slow roller, two hands always
Catch → shuffle → throw

stations.name: Station 2 — Soft toss + hitting
drills: Coach soft-tosses from side into net at waist height
Round 1: middle — drive up the middle
Round 2: inside — hands inside ball, pull-side gap
Round 3: outside — stay back, oppo gap
Cue: 'knob to ball, barrel through zone'

stations.name: Station 3 — Out Field Fielding
drills: Hit fly balls and ground balls from outfied
Focus on tracking balls
Getting Balls in quick
Ask why we need to get balls in quick. All runners must stop once ball is in infeild

stations.name: Station 4 — Throwing accuracy
drills: Targets: a Hula Hoop on dense
Start at 25 / 40 / 60...ft
Score: 1 pts for each target hit
Rotate distance each round

blocks.notes: Whistle to rotate at 12 min. Coaches stay at station, kids move.

blocks.title: Simulated game — 12-spot rotation
drills: Setup: coaches pitch + catch. 8 in field (4 OF + 3B/SS/2B/1B). 5 in bat queue (B1 at bat, B2 on deck, B3 in hole, B4 waiting, B5 waiting).
Each batter: 10 pitches total. Hit what you can. Run the bases off the 10th pitch regardless of contact.
After crossing home, rotate into RF. Everyone else shifts one slot toward bat (see rotation table).
~2 min per batter. 13 batters = full cycle → every kid hits once.
Fielders play it live: outs count, make real throws, call plays.
If clock tight, drop to 8 pitches/batter or cut wrap time.

stations.name: Starting positions (round 1)
drills: B1 (at bat):  #1
B2 (on deck): #2
B3 (in hole): #3
B4 (waiting): #4
B5 (waiting): #5
SS: #8
LCF: #11
RCF: #12

stations.name: Rotation rule (after each batter completes)
drills: B1 (batter who ran) → RF
RF → RCF
RCF → LCF
LCF → LF
LF → 3B
3B → SS
SS → 2B
2B → 1B
1B → B5 (end of bat queue)
B5 → B4
B4 → B3
B3 → B2
B2 → B1 (up to bat)

blocks.notes: Rotation gives every kid a mix of IF + OF + bat over 13 turns. Same order works every practice — just reassign jersey #s to the starting slots.

blocks.title: Cool down + team talk
drills: Light stretch
One thing each kid did well today
Reminder of next practice + game

warmup: Dynamic run-throughs (high knees, butt kicks, carioca)
baserunning: Secondary lead + read on ball in dirt
